summary: Iteration 86 - Balance Sheet Improvements. All features verified working correctly. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance Sheet feature improvements all working. PDF uses landscape A4 with side-by-side layout. Excel uses cols A-B for Liabilities and D-E for Assets. Print button present. ExternalLink icons show on hover for drill-down party navigation. Totals balanced at 86,650.00. FY Summary sub-tabs (FY Summary + Balance Sheet) both working. Login error displays inline.

balance_sheet_pdf_side_by_side.description: PDF uses landscape A4 (841x595 pts) with single table: [Liab Particulars | Liab Amount | separator | Asset Particulars | Asset Amount]
verified: PDF MediaBox confirms landscape orientation (841.8898 x 595.2756)

balance_sheet_excel_side_by_side.description: Excel uses cols A-B for Liabilities and cols D-E for Assets
verified: Row 4: LIABILITIES(A) | Amount(B) | empty(C) | ASSETS(D) | Amount(E)

balance_sheet_drill_down_external_link.description: ExternalLink icons show on hover for party navigation to cashbook
verified: ExternalLink icon component imported and used in BalanceGroup and DetailTable
onClick handler navigates to ledger view with cleaned party name

fy_summary_sub_tabs.description: Both 'FY Summary' and 'Balance Sheet' tabs work
verified: FY Summary tab visible with data-testid='fy-tab-summary'
Balance Sheet tab visible with data-testid='fy-tab-balance-sheet'
Clicking between tabs loads correct component
FY Summary Dashboard shows Cash & Bank, Paddy Stock, FRK Stock, Milling Summary, etc.

login_wrong_password_inline_error.description: Wrong password shows inline error message on login page
verified: Inline error box displayed with data-testid='login-error'
Error displayed in red box below password field

balance_sheet_excel.layout: Liabilities (cols A-B) | Gap (col C) | Assets (cols D-E)
